title: ORGANVM Network Map
description: Per-repo external mirror mapping — the third contract alongside seed.yaml and ecosystem.yaml. Maps ORGANVM repos to relevant open-source projects, communities, and philosophical kinship networks through three equal lenses.

technical.description: Projects whose code runs inside this repo — dependencies, tools, frameworks

parallel.description: Projects solving similar problems in different ways

kinship.description: Communities and projects aligned in values, not necessarily technology

ledger.description: Path to the engagement ledger JSONL file

last_scanned.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last automated scan

project.description: Project identifier (e.g., 'astral-sh/ruff' for GitHub, 'indieweb' for communities)

relevance.description: Why this mirror exists — the connection to this ORGANVM repo

engagement.description: Active engagement forms with this project

url.description: Explicit URL if not derivable from project+platform

notes.description: Additional context about this mirror connection
